author: Alice (Senior SRE)
content:
Alice: We are seeing a spike in failed capture requests on our Stripe API v1 client. Error code: rate_limit_exceeded and invalid_charge_state. Is anyone else seeing this?
Bob: Yeah, I checked the logs. It seems Stripe v1 is failing to handle international transaction retries properly. We might need to upgrade our integration.
Alice: Also, our security audit highlighted that Stripe v1 doesn't comply with the latest PCI-DSS requirements. We need to create a Jira ticket to plan deprecation.

author: Bob (Lead Architect)
content:
Dave: Hey, I am seeing some webhooks failing on the new Adyen integration. Is this a configuration issue?
Bob: Ah, yes. The Adyen webhook signature verification was using the old Stripe client's public key instead of the Adyen secret. I just pushed a fix in commit a8f9c2d. It should be working now.
Dave: Awesome, confirmed. Stripe v1 has been completely turned off in production today. Bye-bye old code!
